name: Chicken/Avacado Rice Salad (Pjxg05a)
recipeInstructions:
1 Refrigerate cooked rice until cold.
2 Peel the avocado and slice lengthwise into 1/2 inch-thick strips. Coat with lemon juice and refrigerate until well chilled.
3 In a large mixing bowl, combine the scallions, olives, chicken, and rice. Toss gently just until mixed.
4 In a small bowl, mix vinegar, mustard, vegetable oil, sugar, and parsley. Whisk together vigorously until completely combined.
5 Just before serving, add the avocado slices to the chicken and rice mixture.
6 Pour on dressing and toss gently to combine thoroughly.
7 Serve sprinkled with toasted nuts and cherry tomatoes.
